name: Airtable MCP Server (Official)
what_it_does: Official Airtable MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Airtable bases — reading and creating records, querying tables with filters, managing fields, and building automations against Airtable's flexible database platform.
use_cases: Reading and querying Airtable records from data-driven agents
Creating records in Airtable from agent-generated outputs
Building automations that sync data to/from Airtable via agents
Querying project tracking bases for status and progress agents
Managing CRM and operations data stored in Airtable
not_for: High-performance database queries (Airtable is not optimized for scale)
Complex multi-table JOINs (use a real DB for complex relational queries)
best_when: An agent needs to read from or write to Airtable bases — particularly in no-code/low-code workflows or teams using Airtable as their operational database.
avoid_when: You need high-performance queries or complex relational operations — use a real database.

auth.notes: Personal access tokens with fine-grained scope selection. OAuth 2.0 for user-delegated access. Scopes include: data.records.read, data.records.write, schema.bases.read, etc.

pricing.notes: Free tier is limited but functional. API access included in all plans. Record limits increase on paid plans.

performance.rate_limits: 5 req/s per API key; 100K records/month on free

known_agent_gotchas: Rate limit (5 req/s) is low — agents must implement throttling for bulk operations
Record IDs (recXXX format) required for updates — must query before updating
Field names are case-sensitive and space-sensitive — must match exact column names
Linked record fields return IDs only — must make additional request to resolve
Free tier record limits may block agents writing many records
filterByFormula syntax is Airtable-specific — not SQL
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Personal access tokens with fine-grained scopes are best-in-class. OAuth 2.0 available. SOC 2 Type II, GDPR, HIPAA. Excellent security posture.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Fine-grained personal access token scopes are excellent — one of the better API security designs. OAuth 2.0. SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA.
